description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux Builds that triggers on push to master, github_actions, and 1.2 branches, as well as on pull requests to the master branch. The workflow should use an ubuntu-20.04 environment and include a matrix of different Godot versions and configurations. Each job should clone the Godot repository and a custom module, set up a custom buildroot, load and upload a cache, and compile Godot with varying flags and options. If the job is a production build, it should upload the resulting executable as an artifact.
